original_prompt: 给这个朱砂手串做一张淘宝主图，要求躺在浅红色背景里并且添加一下元素充实画面
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern Chinese E-commerce [Jewelry/Bracelet] scene, [Premium Minimalist] commercial photography style. [A beaded bracelet composed of deep cinnabar red beads with visible glittering speckles, featuring one translucent peach-pink bead and an intricate blue cloisonné floral metal charm] lies flat in the [Center].
[Props]: Surrounded by [Scattered dried rose petals], [Soft silk ribbons], and [Small golden geometric blocks] (enhancing value).
[Background]: [Light pastel red monochromatic background with subtle gradient].
Lighting is [Studio Softbox with Rim Light], ensuring product details like the gold sparkles and glossy finish are sharp."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (上文下图经典布局).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: 内容: “本命年朱砂”. Position: [Top Left Negative Space]. Style: [3D Bold Sans-serif with soft shadow]. Color: [Deep Gold or White].
2. **Sub Title**: 内容: “高含量紫金砂 / 祈福转运”. Style: [Clean and sharp, slightly smaller than main title].
3. **Marketing Banner**: 内容: “顺丰包邮”. Style: [Premium UI, e.g. '3D Red Gradient Capsule'].
4. **Trust Badge**: 内容: “真品保证”. Style: [Translucent Glass Badge with Gold Rim]."
layout_logic: Since the product is lying flat on a light red background, shadows will be soft but important for grounding. The 'Light Red' background creates a tone-on-tone effect with the Cinnabar, so lighting must highlight the 'Gloss' and 'Gold Sparkles' to separate the product from the background. Text should be placed in the upper empty space (Negative Space) using Gold or White fonts to contrast against the red tones.
